traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light (grayscale).

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Charmed condition.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: You don't need to sleep and can't be magically put to sleep; a 4-hour Long Rest suffices.

optionChoices.name: Elven Lineage
optionChoices.description: Choose the elven lineage that shapes your magic and senses.

options.name: Drow
options.description: Superior Darkvision (120 ft) and lineage spells (Dancing Lights, later Faerie Fire, Darkness).

options.name: High Elf
options.description: You know a wizard cantrip and gain lineage spells (Detect Magic, Misty Step).

options.name: Wood Elf
options.description: Your Speed rises to 35, and you gain lineage spells (Druidcraft, Longstrider, Pass without Trace).
